summary: ANDROID 🟥 | FMD | Play/Pause button giving different outcomes
scenario: In FMD, connecting a device and pressing Play, Stop, then Play again results in no tone on the second Play, stacked tones causing noise, and the Pause button disappearing.
description_clean: In FMD, when a user connects a device and presses Play, then Stop, then Play again, two issues occur: (1) No tone is heard when pressing Play the second time. (2) Tones can stack, producing very bad noise, and the Pause button disappears, requiring the device to be turned off. This can be reproduced on every device by clicking quickly.
expected: When pressing Play the second time, a tone should be heard. The Pause button should remain visible, and no stacking of tones or bad noise should occur.
actual: No tone is heard when pressing Play the second time. Tones can stack, producing very bad noise, and the Pause button disappears, requiring the device to be turned off.
